LSE-HS12-L4-1400P-HSCE-DBT-LAT-01  •  HS Civics & Economics Grade 12  •  Scope and Limits of Rights

The Line Downtown

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a teacher and a girl. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What was the teacher's lesson about?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Construct a complete academic justification. State your claim about what the teacher’s lesson was really about, support that claim with reasoning drawn directly from what he says about every right and where one right meets another, and articulate the conclusion that follows about what the hard part of civic reasoning is.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  CA HSS 12.2  |  HS Civics & Economics Grade 12: Scope and Limits of Rights and Obligations of Democratic Citizens
